compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md and existing docs with eval framework documentation
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Update project documentation to reflect the promptfoo-based skills eval framework.

## Implementation
Update CLAUDE.md architecture section with:
- Eval framework: run-skill-evals.sh orchestrator (Tier 1: changed paths, Tier 2: full suite)
- Per-skill eval convention: evals/promptfooconfig.yaml in each skill directory
- CI: eval-daily.yml cron workflow, P0 ticket creation on failure
- Config: Haiku default grader with per-eval Sonnet override
- Quick reference table entry for run-skill-evals.sh

Update existing docs where test gate or CI behavior is referenced:
- Any doc mentioning test-gate-status should note eval integration
- CI workflow docs should reference eval-daily.yml

Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting conventions.

## Test Exemption
test-exempt: documentation-only change. (1) no conditional logic, (2) test would only assert doc content exists, (3) purely documentation updates.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md architecture section references eval framework
  Verify: grep -q 'run-skill-evals' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md quick reference includes eval command
  Verify: grep -q 'run-skill-evals' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references eval-daily.yml CI workflow
  Verify: grep -q 'eval-daily' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] No new documentation files created (scope constraint)
  Verify: true
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

## Files to modify
- CLAUDE.md (modify)

comments.body: Fixed: CLAUDE.md updated with eval framework architecture and quick reference
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
